Container.Name: OpenClaw
Container.Overview: Self-hosted, LinuxServer.io-style image for the OpenClaw gateway. Uses the PUID/PGID + s6-overlay model so /config is owned by your chosen UID/GID with no manual chown. On Unraid keep PUID=99 / PGID=100 to match appdata ownership. Provide a gateway token and (optionally) an Anthropic API key. The Control UI is served on port 18789. NOTE: allowInsecureAuth is enabled by default for trusted LAN / Tailscale use - do not expose this port to the public internet.
Container.Description: LinuxServer.io-style OpenClaw gateway (PUID/PGID + s6-overlay). Config, state and workspace persist under /config.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent config, state and workspace (the container's ~/.openclaw lives here)

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID that owns /config. Unraid default: 99 (nobody).

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID that owns /config. Unraid default: 100 (users).

Config.Name: UMASK
Config.Description: Umask for files the container creates.

Config.Name: Gateway Token
Config.Description: Auth token for the gateway. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 24

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: Anthropic API key (sk-ant-...). Leave blank if configured another way.
